name: Roasted Potatoes with Olives
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds Yukon Gold, Finnish or Red potatoes, peeled and cut into 1-inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. In a large saucepan, cover the potatoes with 2 quarts of water. Add 1 tablespoon of salt and bring to a boil.
3. Reduce the heat and simmer until the potatoes are almost tender, about 20 minutes.
4. Drain the potatoes in a colander and let them dry in their own steam for 10 minutes.
5. Transfer the potatoes to a rimmed baking sheet and gently toss with olive oil.
6. Roast the potatoes in the oven for about 1 hour, turning them every so often with a flat spatula until golden brown.
7. Pour off any excess oil from the pan.
8. Scatter the olives and garlic over the potatoes and toss.
9. Lower the oven temperature to 350°F and bake the potatoes for an additional 10 minutes.
10. Sprinkle the potatoes with the remaining salt and a little fresh pepper, then serve hot.
